# Direction
Focus: Freight Rail lines
  - Predictions on where might be served & when based on current maps and expenditures
  - Time series % Graph theory -> How congestion propegates
        - What kinds of failure events are becoming more common? -> Cox's Hazard Modelling (Model & Graph failures) -> Categorical Data Analysis -> in GLMNet Package
  - Spacial modelling, change of networks overtime
  - Resilience of networks and what are critical nodes 
  - Map of freight lines + find critical points of failure in that network

One line through time -> What can we track about it?
  - Frequency Analysis

## TODO
[] Abstract and Titile - Feb 11
